info.title: ok
info.description: A dotnet core command line tool to work with '.ok' files.

commands.name: list
commands.description:
Show the list from the '.ok' file.
Default command when none are specified.

options.name: --file
options.description: Use a custom file instead of '.ok'.

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Show more output, mostly errors.
Will also show environment-variables in this screen.

options.name: --list
options.description:
Show the list from the '.ok' file.
Default command when none are specified.
